info.name: P NATIVE WORKER TOOLS (Orchestration)
info.description: Auto-generated collection of P's internal Mac Studio orchestration bindings and gateway executions.

exec: // Normalize raw_payload (iteration data object -> JSON string)
// Hard safety gates for mutation runs

throw new Error(`[GUARD:READONLY_BLOCK] tool=${target} iter="${pm.iterationData.get("name") || ""}" -> mutation denied. Required: env.ALLOW_MUTATIONS="true" AND data.mutation_intent="YES". Observed: env.ALLOW_MUTATIONS="${pm.environment.get("ALLOW_MUTATIONS")}" data.mutation_intent="${pm.iterationData.get("mutation_intent")}".`);

throw new Error(`[GUARD:MUTATION_ALLOWLIST] tool=${target} iter="${pm.iterationData.get("name") || ""}" -> rejected. This lane only permits destructive tools. If this is intended to be read-only, move it to the canary data file. Allowed destructive tools: ${Array.from(destructive).join(", ")}`);
if (!order.length) throw new Error("Collection variable `request_order` is missing/empty.");
if (idx === -1) throw new Error(`Request "${current}" not found in request_order.`);

request.description: Execute arbitrary Google Cloud REST APIs acting natively as the gcloud SDK. Use this for raw REST endpoints; use query_bigquery for BigQuery SQL.
Run SQL on Google BigQuery.
Read the entire platform context.
Delegate a task to the Pushing Capital worker ecosystem.
Command Manny's specific client interface to immediately open a specific URL.
Spawn an Antigravity spatial logic node for a task or directive.
Run Antigravity's autonomous architect pipeline to compile a structured blueprint from a payload.
Drive Manny's persistent Playwright browser session to inspect and interact with webpages. Use snapshot to understand the current page before clicking or filling elements.
Capture the live browser view from Manny's Mac and answer a visual question using the screenshot as ground truth. Use this when Manny asks what you can see or what a page looks like.
Execute a raw shell command directly on Manny's local Mac Studio.
Return the authenticated GitHub CLI user and auth state on Manny's Mac.
Clone a GitHub repository onto Manny's Mac using the authenticated GitHub CLI.
List GitHub repositories for an owner or the authenticated account from Manny's Mac.
Inspect a GitHub repository and list its root contents from Manny's Mac.
Read a specific file from a GitHub repository on Manny's Mac.
Inspect a local git repository on Manny's Mac and return branch plus working tree status.
Create or switch to a branch in a local repository on Manny's Mac.
Stage all changes, commit them, and optionally push from a local repository on Manny's Mac.
Create a GitHub pull request from a local repository on Manny's Mac.
Add a comment to a GitHub issue or pull request from a local repository on Manny's Mac.
Trigger a GitHub Actions workflow from a local repository on Manny's Mac.
Return the authenticated PCRM principal attached to the worker's PCRM bearer token.
List PCRM records directly from platform.pushingcap.com. Use for contacts, companies, deals, tasks, tickets, invoices, current_state, and similar objects.
Fetch a single PCRM record by object and id.
Create a PCRM record directly. Use fields for the record payload.
Update one PCRM field on a record.
Soft-delete a PCRM record.
Archive or unarchive a PCRM record.
List PCRM properties for an object.
List PCRM associations for a record.
Associate two PCRM records directly.
Remove an association between two PCRM records.
Read PCRM orchestration metadata directly from the control plane.
Read the PCRM agent registry directly.
Read the PCRM backend action catalog.
Read the configured PCRM social channel registry.
Create or update the persistent working plan for the current Manny session. Use this before and during multi-step investigations so the execution plan survives across turns.
Append a collected finding, source note, or evidence item to the current session scratchpad.
Read the current session working plan and recent collected notes.
Use Gemini Enterprise answer mode over P's notebook and memory layer to synthesize a grounded answer with supporting references.
Search P's authoritative NotebookLM Memory matrix for deep context.
Return the canonical P notebook catalog with notebook IDs, resource names, roles, and routing guidance.
Upload a core markdown document into P's brain permanently.
Execute a generic SQL query against PCRM Postgres instances (God Mode).
Control specific Google Compute Engine VMs physically.
Read a NotebookLM notebook or specific source inside the notebook natively. To read the notebook manifest, only pass notebook_id.
Write or upload a new markdown source file into a NotebookLM notebook natively.
Edit or patch an existing source inside NotebookLM.
Delete a source file from NotebookLM.
